query:
INSERT INTO modifier_template_options (template_id, name, price, is_default, sort_order) VALUES 
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Chinese Sides' LIMIT 1), 'Boiled Rice', '0.00', true, 0),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Chinese Sides' LIMIT 1), 'Fried Rice', '0.50', false, 1),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Chinese Sides' LIMIT 1), 'Chips', '0.50', false, 2),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Chinese Sides' LIMIT 1), 'Fried Noodle', '2.00', false, 3),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Chinese Sides' LIMIT 1), 'Yung Chow Fried Rice (Small)', '2.00', false, 4);
